title: InterviewCracker – AI Mock Interview Assistant
description: AI-powered mock interview platform with generated feedback and answers for improvement.

title: Certify
description: A Quiz Application that allows users to take quizzes and earn certificates upon successful completion. The application provides a user-friendly interface for quiz participation and certificate generation.

title: ClipBoard Manager
description: A simple clipboard manager application that allows users to store and retrieve text snippets easily.

title: Weather App
description: A simple yet effective weather application that provides current weather information and forecasts for any location. Built with a modern UI and responsive design.

title: Image-Search-Engine
description: An interactive image gallery powered by the Unsplash API. This project showcases a responsive layout, a user-friendly search form, and a dynamic image grid. Users can explore a diverse collection of images and enjoy a seamless browsing experience with the 'Load More' button. Feel free to contribute and explore the world of Unsplash images !

title: Learning Management System (LMS)
description: Collaborated with a team to develop a comprehensive Learning Management System for Mankar College students. Gained hands-on experience and received certification for the project.
